Regular Season.title: Team Argument
Regular Season.effect: The team drawn has an argument after the last practice. Select their next 3 games and force loss.

Regular Season.title: Chemistry Builds Wins
Regular Season.effect: The leaders of the team drawn improve team chemistry with off-court activities. Select the next 3 games and force win.

Regular Season.title: Setback While Recovering
Regular Season.effect: Increase the injury duration of the highest overall injured player of the team drawn by 15 days.

Regular Season.title: Surprising Comeback
Regular Season.effect: Decrease the injury duration of the highest overall injured player of the team drawn by 15 days.

Regular Season.title: Time to Say Goodbye
Regular Season.effect: Fire the coach of the first team drawn that is under .400.

Regular Season.title: Players-Only Meeting
Regular Season.effect: After a rough stretch, veterans call a private team meeting. Flip a coin: heads = force win next game, tails = force loss next game.

Regular Season.title: Can't Recover
Regular Season.effect: The most seriously injured player loses rhythm. Decrease all shooting attributes by 3 permanently.

Regular Season.title: Hamstring Tightness
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn suffers hamstring tightness and misses 1-3 games.

Regular Season.title: Cutting Heads
Regular Season.effect: The team is sold to a very expressive owner. Fire the GM and Head Coach.

Regular Season.title: Bench Spark
Regular Season.effect: Select the sixth man and permanently increase shooting attributes, offensive consistency, shot IQ and shooting tendencies by 5.

Regular Season.title: We Found a Deal
Regular Season.effect: Extend the best eligible player for the amount he initially asks.

Regular Season.title: We Can't Disagree More
Regular Season.effect: The best extension-eligible player disagrees on terms. Trade him immediately.

Regular Season.title: My Last Rodeo
Regular Season.effect: The oldest player announces retirement at season end. Make him 45 years old post-playoffs.

Regular Season.title: We Need to Sell
Regular Season.effect: Trade the 2nd or 3rd best player (not rookie scale) depending on team direction.

Regular Season.title: Big Scuffle
Regular Season.effect: Two expressive or unpredictable players fight in practice. Suspend both for 1 game.

Regular Season.title: Two-Way Impact
Regular Season.effect: Select the best two-way player. Increase shooting attributes by 5, offensive consistency by 10 and shot tendencies by 5.

Regular Season.title: Reinforcements
Regular Season.effect: Cut the worst non two-way player and sign the best available free agent at the same position.

Regular Season.title: Sorry for the Long Trip
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn must be traded to the other conference before the deadline.

Regular Season.title: I Wanna Stay
Regular Season.effect: Increase loyalty to 100 for the best player on a rookie deal.

Regular Season.title: Coach's Out
Regular Season.effect: The head coach announces this is his last year. Fire him at season end.

Regular Season.title: I Swear It Was Traffic
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn arrives late to practice. Suspend him for the next game.

Regular Season.title: Falling Down
Regular Season.effect: One of the Top-10 players in the draft class tears his ACL. Decrease right knee durability by 25.

Regular Season.title: Bad Offseason
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn starts the season in bad shape. Reduce all attributes by 2.

Regular Season.title: G-League Scoring Intake
Regular Season.effect: The team drawn signs the top G-League scorer of the season.

Regular Season.title: G-League Passing Intake
Regular Season.effect: The team drawn signs the top G-League assist leader of the season.

Regular Season.title: G-League Rebounding Intake
Regular Season.effect: The team drawn signs the top G-League rebounder of the season.

Regular Season.title: Got the Flu
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn is out for one week with the flu.

Regular Season.title: Never Going to That Restaurant Again
Regular Season.effect: After eating out, the player drawn is out for one week with food poisoning.

Regular Season.title: Family Reasons
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn is out for one week for personal reasons.

Regular Season.title: Load Management Stretch
Regular Season.effect: A star with heavy minutes is managed carefully. Rest him for 1 game in each back-to-back over the next two weeks.

Regular Season.title: Minutes Restriction
Regular Season.effect: A player returning from injury is capped at 20-24 minutes for the next 5 games.

Regular Season.title: Working on Myself
Regular Season.effect: Select a Top-10 draft prospect and increase his potential by 5.

Regular Season.title: What About Practice?
Regular Season.effect: Select a Top-10 draft prospect and decrease his potential by 5.

Regular Season.title: New Help on D
Regular Season.effect: Hire a defensive assistant coach. Boost perimeter and interior defense by 2 for all players.

Regular Season.title: League Fine
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn is fined after public comments. Suspend him for 1 game or decrease offensive consistency by 2 for the next 5 games.

Regular Season.title: New Schemes
Regular Season.effect: Hire an offensive assistant coach. Boost shot IQ and offensive consistency by 2 for all players.

Regular Season.title: Chronic Injury Management
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn has a chronic issue flare up. Reduce his stamina by 5 and place him on a 2-week minutes restriction.

Regular Season.title: New Diet
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn changes diet and training regimen. Increase all durability attributes by 5.

Regular Season.title: It's Me or You
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn criticizes the coach. Roll: 1 = fire coach, 2 = trade player.

Regular Season.title: Veteran Trash Talk
Regular Season.effect: Roll: 1 = +5 defensive consistency, 2 = -5 offensive consistency.

Regular Season.title: Film Session Fallout
Regular Season.effect: Player is suspended for 1 game after a dispute during film review.

Regular Season.title: Emotional Game
Regular Season.effect: The team plays an emotional game after external news. Flip a coin and force a win or loss.

Regular Season.title: NBA Cup Momentum
Regular Season.effect: After a strong NBA Cup run, the team carries momentum. Force a win in one of the next two games.

Regular Season.title: Rookie Wall
Regular Season.effect: A rookie hits fatigue in mid-season. Decrease stamina by 5 and offensive consistency by 3 until the All-Star break.

Regular Season.title: Alpha Dog
Regular Season.effect: An 85+ overall player (28 or younger) steps up as a leader. Assign him the Alpha Dog badge if he does not already have it.

Regular Season.title: Back Up the Brinks Truck
Regular Season.effect: A player in a contract year plays at another level. Increase all offensive attributes by 3–7.

Regular Season.title: Heating Up
Regular Season.effect: A player catches fire. Select one random hot zone and make it Hot.

Regular Season.title: Shot Profile Slump
Regular Season.effect: A player loses confidence from one floor area. Change one random hot zone to neutral.

Regular Season.title: Help Wanted
Regular Season.effect: A star pushes management to improve immediately. Change team status to Contending.

Regular Season.title: LeGM
Regular Season.effect: A player demands the team acquire a specific player. Roll again to determine the requested player and team. Attempt to acquire him via trade or free agency.

Regular Season.title: Dog House
Regular Season.effect: A player rated 80 overall or lower is benched. Force Non-Starter status for the remainder of the season.

Regular Season.title: Out of Nowhere
Regular Season.effect: The lowest overall player on the team shows unexpected growth. Increase his potential by 6-10.

Regular Season.title: Player Needs Surgery (Minor)
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn suffers a minor injury and is out for 1–40 days.

Regular Season.title: Player Needs Surgery (Moderate)
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn suffers a moderate injury and is out for 45–90 days.

Regular Season.title: Player Needs Surgery (Severe)
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn suffers a severe injury and is out for 100–200 days.

Regular Season.title: Player Won’t Re-Sign
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn will not re-sign with the team. He must be traded before free agency or allowed to walk.

Regular Season.title: Superstar Trade Demand
Regular Season.effect: An 80+ overall player demands a trade and must be dealt before the trade deadline.

Regular Season.title: Trade Demand
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn demands a trade and must be dealt before the trade deadline.

Regular Season.title: The Cliff Is Near
Regular Season.effect: A player aged 28 or older sees decline coming. Decrease his potential by 3–12.

Regular Season.title: Untapped Potential
Regular Season.effect: The player drawn unlocks hidden upside. Increase his potential by 3–12 (up to league max).

Regular Season.title: Locker Room Conflict
Regular Season.effect: A feud damages chemistry. Resolve by trading one involved player or suspending him for the season.

Regular Season.title: Hot Streak
Regular Season.effect: A player averaging 25+ PPG over 10 games (below 86 OVR) gains +5 offensive consistency and a silver shooting badge.

Regular Season.title: Cold Spell
Regular Season.effect: A struggling scorer loses confidence. Decrease all shooting attributes by 2.

Regular Season.title: National TV Statement
Regular Season.effect: A star responds to a marquee matchup. Force a win in one nationally televised game this month.

Regular Season.title: Back-to-Back Fatigue
Regular Season.effect: On the second night of a back-to-back, reduce team stamina and force one loss in the next two back-to-back sets.

Regular Season.title: Scouting Report Exposed
Regular Season.effect: Opponents target your weak point. Decrease one starter's shot IQ by 3 for the next 8 games.

Trade Deadline.title: Grass Is Greener
Trade Deadline.effect: Select the most recently traded player and increase all attributes by 2.

Trade Deadline.title: Home Sick
Trade Deadline.effect: Select the most recently traded player and decrease all attributes by 2.

Trade Deadline.title: Star Disaster
Trade Deadline.effect: The best player requests a trade. Trade him before the deadline.

Trade Deadline.title: No Market for Veteran
Trade Deadline.effect: The front office cannot find a suitable deal for a veteran on a large contract. Keep him through season end.

Trade Deadline.title: Calling for Help
Trade Deadline.effect: Trade for a 78+ overall player before the deadline.

Trade Deadline.title: We Need to Sell
Trade Deadline.effect: Trade the 2nd or 3rd best player depending on team direction.

Trade Deadline.title: Out of Conference
Trade Deadline.effect: The player drawn must be traded to the other conference.

Trade Deadline.title: Overpayed
Trade Deadline.effect: Increase salary of a newly extended player by 150%.

Trade Deadline.title: Making Moves
Trade Deadline.effect: If contending trade a 1st for a 75+ OVR player. If rebuilding trade a top-3 veteran for a 1st.

Trade Deadline.title: We Can't Disagree More
Trade Deadline.effect: Trade the best extension-eligible player immediately.

Trade Deadline.title: Failed Tests
Trade Deadline.effect: Revert the most recent trade. Set knee durability of the highest OVR involved to 50.

Trade Deadline.title: Can't Work With You Anymore
Trade Deadline.effect: Even number = fire coach, odd number = fire GM.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The player drawn changes diet and training regimen. Increase all durability attributes by 5.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Chronic Injury Management
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The player drawn has a chronic issue flare up. Reduce his stamina by 5 and place him on a 2-week minutes restriction.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: New Schemes
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Hire an offensive assistant coach. Boost shot IQ and offensive consistency by 2 for all players on the team.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Doping Ban
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The player drawn is suspended for the rest of the season for violating anti-doping policies.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: New Help on D
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Hire a defensive assistant coach. Boost perimeter and interior defense by 2 for all players on the team.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: What About Practice?
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Select a Top-10 draft prospect and decrease his potential by 5.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: After eating out, the player drawn is out for one week with food poisoning.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The team drawn signs the top G-League rebounder of the season.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The team drawn signs the top G-League assist leader of the season.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The team drawn signs the top G-League scorer of the season.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The player drawn arrives late to practice. Suspend him for the next game.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: I Wanna Stay
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Increase loyalty to 100 for the best player on a rookie deal.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Reinforcements
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Cut the worst non two-way player and sign the best available free agent at the same position.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Two-Way Impact
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Select the best two-way player. Increase shooting attributes by 5, offensive consistency by 10 and shot tendencies by 5.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Big Scuffle
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Two expressive or unpredictable players fight in practice. Suspend both for 1 game.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: My Last Rodeo
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The oldest player announces retirement at season end. After playoffs, make him 45 so he retires.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Bench Spark
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Select the sixth man and permanently increase shooting attributes, offensive consistency, shot IQ and shooting tendencies by 5.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Crashing Out
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The player drawn is out 30 days with a broken knee due to an off-court accident.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Players-Only Meeting

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Surprising Comeback
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Decrease the injury duration of the highest overall injured player by 15 days.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Chemistry Builds Wins
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Team chemistry improves. Select the next 3 games and force win.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Team Argument
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: The team argues after practice. Select the next 3 games and force loss.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Veteran Trash Talk
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Roll: 1 = +5 defensive consistency, 2 = -5 offensive consistency.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Film Session Fallout
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Player is suspended for 1 game after a dispute during film review.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Emotional Game
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Flip a coin and force a win or loss.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Buyout Market Surprise
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Sign the best veteran buyout candidate who fits your weakest rotation spot.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Shut It Down
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: A non-contending team shuts down a veteran with a nagging injury. Sit him for the rest of the regular season.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Play-In Push
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Team locks in for the final stretch. Force one win against a direct play-in/playoff rival.

Regular Season Post-Deadline.title: Two-Way Promotion
Regular Season Post-Deadline.effect: Convert a two-way player to a standard deal and give him at least 15 MPG for the next 5 games.

Playoffs.title: We Need You
Playoffs.effect: Decrease injury duration of the highest overall injured player by 15 days.

Playoffs.title: Ouch
Playoffs.effect: Player is out 30 days with a broken knee.

Playoffs.title: Splitting Ways
Playoffs.effect: Two best players argue. Ensure they do not stay together.

Playoffs.title: New Start
Playoffs.effect: Fire coach and GM of an underperforming playoff team.

Playoffs.title: Game-Time Decision
Playoffs.effect: A star is listed questionable pregame. Roll: 1-2 plays at full strength, 3-4 limited minutes, 5-6 out for the game.

Playoffs.title: Whistle Trouble
Playoffs.effect: A key defender gets into foul trouble. Reduce his minutes heavily and force a loss in one quarter or one game segment.

Coaching Carousel.title: You Let Us Down
Coaching Carousel.effect: Fire the coach of the best team that missed the playoffs.

Coaching Carousel.title: Promotion Time
Coaching Carousel.effect: Fire head coach and promote an assistant.

Coaching Carousel.title: Fresh Faces
Coaching Carousel.effect: Team is sold. Fire Head Coach.

Draft Combine.title: Impressive Combine - Athleticism
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase Speed, Speed with Ball, Lateral Quickness, Acceleration, Strength and Vertical by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Impressive Combine - Measurements
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase height by 1 inch and wingspan by 5 points.

Draft Combine.title: Silk from Deep
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase Mid-Range and 3pt attributes by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Laser Vision
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase Pass Accuracy, Pass Vision and Ball Handle by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Clamp Session
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase Perimeter Defense, Help Defense IQ and Lateral Quickness by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Paint Presence
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase Close Shot, Post Control, Interior Defense and Block by 5.

Draft Combine.title: I Need Surgery
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. An injury during a workout causes him to miss 350 days.

Draft Combine.title: Poor Combine - Athleticism
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease Speed, Speed with Ball, Lateral Quickness, Acceleration, Strength and Vertical by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Poor Combine - Measurements
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease height by 1 inch and wingspan by 5 points.

Draft Combine.title: Brick Drill Disaster
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease Mid-Range and 3pt attributes by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Tunnel Vision
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease Pass Accuracy, Pass Vision and Ball Handle by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Blown Assignments
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease Perimeter Defense, Help Defense IQ and Lateral Quickness by 5.

Draft Combine.title: No Paint Touch
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease Close Shot, Post Control, Interior Defense and Block by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Fast Learner
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease peak start age by 2 years.

Draft Combine.title: Slow Learner
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase peak start age by 2 years.

Draft Combine.title: Unbreakable
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase all durability attributes by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Fragile
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease all durability attributes by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Edge of the Cliff
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease peak end age by 2 years.

Draft Combine.title: My Body Is My Temple
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase peak end age by 2 years.

Draft Combine.title: Out of Shape
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Decrease Speed, Acceleration, Lateral Quickness and Strength by 3, and Stamina by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Best Shape of Life
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Increase Speed, Acceleration, Lateral Quickness and Strength by 3, and Stamina by 5.

Draft Combine.title: Medical Recheck
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. Lower all durability attributes by 8.

Draft Combine.title: International Phenom
Draft Combine.effect: The best overseas player impresses during workouts. Increase his potential by 2.

Draft Combine.title: International Bust
Draft Combine.effect: The best overseas player disappoints during workouts. Decrease his potential by 2.

Draft Combine.title: New Trainer
Draft Combine.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 45 for the corresponding player on the draft board. A new trainer increases all attributes by 1.

Draft Combine.title: Draft Class Re-evaluated
Draft Combine.effect: Randomly select one Top-5 prospect to lose 5 potential and one prospect outside the Top-20 to gain 5 potential.

Draft.title: True Gem
Draft.effect: Increase the potential of the best player just drafted by the team drawn by 5.

Draft.title: A Real Bust
Draft.effect: Decrease the potential of the best player just drafted by the team drawn by 5.

Draft.title: Salary Dump
Draft.effect: Select the worst contract of the team drawn and dump him with a 1st or 2nd round pick to a rebuilding team.

Draft.title: I Don't Want to Be Here
Draft.effect: The best pick of the team drawn does not want to play there and must be traded before the start of the regular season.

Draft.title: Different Schools There
Draft.effect: Find the best European or foreign player selected in the 2nd round and increase all of his attributes by 3.

Draft.title: Trade Up
Draft.effect: Make the team drawn trade up at least 3 places in the draft.

Draft.title: Trade Down
Draft.effect: Make the team drawn trade down at least 3 places in the draft.

Draft.title: I'm Out (For the Year)
Draft.effect: The best rookie of the team drawn suffers an injury shortly after the draft and misses the entire season.

Draft.title: Nothing Interesting This Year
Draft.effect: The team drawn must trade their best pick of the current draft for a future pick.

Draft.title: We Have Found a Younger Replacement
Draft.effect: The team drawn trades their best player (must be 25 or older) for the highest pick available in this year's draft.

Draft.title: New Trainer
Draft.effect: A new trainer helps a prospect develop, increasing all of his attributes by 1.

Draft.title: Where Did This Come From ?!
Draft.effect: Increase all attributes by 3 and potential by 5 for a player drafted in the second round.

Free Agency.title: I'm Out
Free Agency.effect: The best or second-best player of the team drawn demands a trade and must be dealt within the first 3 days of free agency.

Free Agency.title: Saudade
Free Agency.effect: The best foreign free agent aged 32 or older decides to return to his home country. Delete him from the roster.

Free Agency.title: Ring Chaser
Free Agency.effect: Select the player drawn and set loyalty to 0, financial security to 0, and play-for-win to 100.

Free Agency.title: Win Now
Free Agency.effect: Select the team drawn and improve their chances of winning more games next season.

Free Agency.title: Rebuilding Time
Free Agency.effect: Trade one of the Top-3 players of the team drawn (must be 25 or older) for the best offer that includes at least a 1st round pick.

Free Agency.title: Salary Dump
Free Agency.effect: Select the worst contract of the team drawn and dump him with a 1st or 2nd round pick to a rebuilding team.

Free Agency.title: I'm Retiring
Free Agency.effect: The oldest player in the free agency pool decides to retire. Make him 45 years old and set all attributes to 25.

Free Agency.title: Tampering Investigation
Free Agency.effect: A handshake deal falls apart due to league scrutiny. Cancel one pending verbal agreement and sign a fallback option.

Free Agency.title: Bad Timing
Free Agency.effect: Select one of the Top-10 remaining free agents and put him out for 150 days with an injury.

Free Agency.title: Trip To Europe
Free Agency.effect: A fringe player(75 OVR or less) decides to test his luck in the Euroleague, reroll next year to see if his plan worked out or not (+/- 3 OVR). Player is out for year due to personal reasons

Free Agency.title: I'm Not Coming Back
Free Agency.effect: Select the highest-overall free agent with an offer from his old team and remove that offer by making a bad counter-offer.

Free Agency.title: Euroleague's finest
Free Agency.effect: The team signs one of the best current Euroleague performers in a position of need.

Free Agency.title: Sign-and-Trade Window
Free Agency.effect: Turn one departing free agent into a sign-and-trade return (at least one useful rotation piece or a future 2nd).

Free Agency.title: Cap Casualty
Free Agency.effect: To open cap space, waive and stretch one overpaid veteran with 2+ years remaining.

Free Agency.title: Player Option Surprise
Free Agency.effect: A veteran expected to opt in declines his player option. Remove him from your retained core plans immediately.

Summer League.title: Defensive Specialist
Summer League.effect: Increase perimeter defense and help defense IQ by 5.

Summer League.title: Summer League Breakout
Summer League.effect: Increase potential by 2 and offensive consistency by 5.

Summer League.title: A Man Reborn
Summer League.effect: Increase all attributes by 3 for a veteran.

Summer League.title: Second Unit Anchor
Summer League.effect: A young big earns trust. Increase screen setting, defensive rebound and interior defense by 4.

Summer League.title: Playmaking Growth
Summer League.effect: Increase pass accuracy and pass vision by 5.

Summer League.title: Hustle Guy
Summer League.effect: Increase rebounding and hustle tendencies by 5.

Summer League.title: Rookie Connection
Summer League.effect: Boost consistency of two young players by 3.

Summer League.title: Scoring Showcase
Summer League.effect: Increase shooting attributes by 6 and shot tendency by 5.

Summer League.title: Tough Luck
Summer League.effect: Rookie or sophomore out 120 days due to injury.

Summer League.title: Undrafted Steal
Summer League.effect: A Summer League invite pops. Sign one undrafted player to a two-way deal and boost his potential by 2.

Training Camp.title: Contract Year
Training Camp.effect: The best player on an expiring deal of the team drawn receives a +3 boost in shooting (layup, close, mid, 3pt), rebounding and passing (accuracy, vision) attributes.

Training Camp.title: Best Shape of Life
Training Camp.effect: The player drawn receives a boost in Speed, Acceleration, Lateral Quickness and Strength by 3 points.

Training Camp.title: Edge of the Cliff
Training Camp.effect: Draw a number between 1 and 30 for the corresponding player in the Draft Board. Decrease his peak end by 2 years.

Training Camp.title: Grass Is Greener
Training Camp.effect: Select the best new player on the team and boost his shooting (layup, close, mid, 3pt) attributes by 3 each.

Training Camp.title: Home Sick
Training Camp.effect: Select the best new player on the team and decrease his shooting (layup, close, mid, 3pt) attributes by 3 each.

Training Camp.title: Locked In, Lockdown
Training Camp.effect: The player drawn has worked a lot on his defense with a new coach. Increase Post Defense, Perimeter Defense, Help Defense IQ, and Pick and Roll Defense IQ by 5 each. Increase Defensive Consistency by 10.

Training Camp.title: New Free Throw Routine - Decline
Training Camp.effect: The player drawn changes his free throw routine for a worse one. Decrease his Free Throw attribute by 3.

Training Camp.title: New Free Throw Routine - Improve
Training Camp.effect: The player drawn changes his free throw routine for a better one. Increase his Free Throw attribute by 3.

Training Camp.title: Out of Shape
Training Camp.effect: The player drawn receives a decrease in Speed, Acceleration, Lateral Quickness and Strength by 3 points.

Training Camp.title: Summer 3
Training Camp.effect: The player drawn has worked a lot on his 3-point shot during the summer. Increase the 3pt attribute and 3pt shot tendency by 5 each if above 60 3pt shooting. Otherwise increase by 30 and tendency by 10

Training Camp.title: Better Health
Training Camp.effect: Increase all durability attributes of the player drawn by 5.

Training Camp.title: More Fragile Than Ever
Training Camp.effect: Decrease all durability attributes of the player drawn by 5.

Training Camp.title: Most Improved Player?
Training Camp.effect: Increase all shooting attributes (layup, close, mid, 3pt) by 7 and offensive consistency by 10. Increase shoot and touch tendency by 15. Increase all defensive stats by 2 and physical stats by 1.

Training Camp.title: Can't Recover
Training Camp.effect: Select a seriously injured player in the league (60+ days out). Decrease all shooting attributes (layup, close, mid, 3pt) by 3.

Training Camp.title: My Last Rodeo
Training Camp.effect: The oldest player of the team drawn announces his retirement at the end of the year. After playoffs, make him 45 years old so he retires.

Training Camp.title: Sophomore Slump
Training Camp.effect: A shopomore has a tough summer and regresses. Reduce overall by 1 and all durability stats by 3.

Training Camp.title: International Love
Training Camp.effect: The best foreign player of the team drawn shines in an international tournament. Increase all shooting attributes by 5, plus shot IQ and offensive consistency.

Training Camp.title: No Break
Training Camp.effect: The player drawn injures himself during an offseason game and is out for the entire season.

Training Camp.title: Small setback
Training Camp.effect: The player drawn suffers an injury in scrimmage and is out for 180 days.

Training Camp.title: Surprise Surprise
Training Camp.effect: After an argument with the board, fire the head coach of the team drawn.

Training Camp.title: Growth Spurt
Training Camp.effect: Player still on rookie deal grows by 2 inches (also increase wingspan by 5). Increase Peremiter/Interior Defense, Steal, Block, Dunking by 3

Training Camp.title: Defensive Focus Camp
Training Camp.effect: Increase defensive consistency of all players on the team by 3.

Training Camp.title: New Pre-Game Routine
Training Camp.effect: Increase stamina by 3 and durability by 3 for the player drawn.

Training Camp.title: Overconfidence Spike
Training Camp.effect: Increase shot tendency by 5 and decrease shot IQ by 3.

Training Camp.title: Elite Mentorship
Training Camp.effect: The player is mentored by a team legend and improves the legend's best attribute (e.g., post game for Shaq, passing for Nash).

Training Camp.title: Continuity Camp
Training Camp.effect: Returning core builds chemistry early. Increase offensive and defensive consistency by 2 for all projected starters.

Training Camp.title: Analytics Department Upgrade
Training Camp.effect: Team embraces matchup data. Increase shot IQ by 3 for the top-8 rotation players.

Training Camp.title: Load Monitoring Program
Training Camp.effect: Training staff installs a proactive plan. Increase durability by 2 for all players 30+ years old.
